MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MIGUEL SOTO, TEL. NO. (408) 833-5456 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ANTHONY MENTO'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS Granted. No opposition filed. Responsive pleading must be filed by December 7, 2012.
